subject: Remove declaration of thrown exception
commit_message:
Remove declaration of thrown exception

Remove the declaration of thrown exception, as it cannot be thrown from method's body

Change-Id: If3d9f1f35eb0789001666e9bf58cded137256101
Issue-ID: CCSDK-1612
Signed-off-by: anushadasari <danush10@in.ibm.com>
